untranslatable_reason: The signal requires arithmetic operations (addition/subtraction with multiplied ATR values) which cannot be expressed using the allowed 3-field condition format. The rule 'close rises by more than k × ATR from previous close' translates to 'close > prev_close + (k × ATR)' which requires inline calculation operators not supported by the schema. Additionally, the parameter 'n' (lookback period for ATR) is marked as AUTHOR_SILENT with no default specified.
translation_notes: Signal is context-dependent (generates both long and short signals). Used atr_14 as a reasonable default ATR indicator since parameter n is not specified. The core logic cannot be properly translated into the 3-field condition structure without mathematical expression support.
